[01] / about

a short introduction.

the part where i tell you what i actually do — without the resume voice.

i'm minh ho. i was born and raised in Vietnam, and now i live in Houston, Texas. i’m a senior at the university of houston’s c.t. bauer college of business, studying management information systems and management.

my work sits at the intersection of data, systems, and business clarity. at the lab consulting, i work with messy datasets, data mapping, power bi dashboards, microsoft fabric, sql, and documentation that helps teams understand what the numbers are actually saying.

i also enjoy building web projects with html, css, javascript, and ai tools like chatgpt, claude ai, microsoft copilot, and google gemini. i like using technology to make complicated information easier to use, explain, and share.

outside of work and school, i stay active through tennis and running. tennis is my favorite sport, and i’m involved with the UH Tennis Club. i also enjoy running around my neighborhood, memorial park, on the treadmill, and with friends.

10+
power bi dashboards

[02] / involvement

involvement & life.

sports, running, travel, and community as i finish college and move into the next chapter.
// favorite sport

UH tennis club.

my favorite sport and one of the biggest parts of my college experience.

college memories through UH Tennis Club.

As I get ready to graduate from the University of Houston, UH Tennis Club is one of the biggest parts of my college experience. Tennis is my favorite sport, and the club gave me a place to play, compete, meet new people, help with events, and build community with other students.

// fitness routine

running & training.

fitness, consistency, and training for the next goal after graduation.

training for the next goal.

Running is part of my routine right now, especially as I finish college and stay focused on my next chapter. My highest distance so far is 10 miles, and my next goal is to train for a half marathon. My favorite places to run are my neighborhood, Memorial Park, and the treadmill. I also love running with friends because it makes training more fun and keeps me consistent.

running 10 miles half marathon goal half marathon goal with friends
10 mi highest distance · next goal: half marathon
// travel

travel & exploring.

places I have a connection to now and countries I want to visit next.

seeing more of the world.

Travel is something I want to do more after graduation. I was born and raised in Vietnam, and now I live in Houston, so both places are important to my story. I like exploring new cities, trying local food, taking photos, and learning how different cultures feel. Some places on my travel list include Japan and Taiwan. South Korea is the next trip on the list — food, design, and a country I have wanted to see in person for a long time. After that: England, France, Spain, and Turkey.

South Korea England France Spain Turkey
travel food photos culture next trips after graduation
[02] / how i work

operating principles.

four rules i actually follow, not the ones that sound nice on linkedin.
i.
clean the data first.
everything downstream is a lie until you do.
ii.
a slow query that works beats a fast one that doesn't.
then you make it fast.
iii.
document as you go.
future-you is a different person with a worse memory.
iv.
ship the dashboard, then iterate.
nobody learns from a deck that never went out.
